139.reason: 如果 pos 到达行尾，line.charAt(pos) 会抛出 StringIndexOutOfBoundsException

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  如果 pos 到达行尾，line.charAt(pos) 会抛出 StringIndexOutOfBoundsException

148.reason: Accessing line.charAt(pos) without checking bounds (pos < line.length()). If '&' is the last character on the line, this causes a StringIndexOutOfBoundsException.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  Missing bounds check `pos < line.length()` before accessing `line.charAt(pos)`, causing `StringIndexOutOfBoundsException` if `&` is the last character on the line.
